entryPoint.notes: Inline arrow function on each <li>: onClick={() => onNavigate && onNavigate(section.id)}

calls.notes: Sets activeSection to one of: 'documents', 'upload', 'search', 'tags'. No API call is made. All four sections re-render DocumentGrid unchanged.

entryPoint.notes: Bound to <form onSubmit>. Guards with query.trim() check before firing onSearch prop.

calls.notes: Imperative delegate: calls this.documentGridRef?.handleSearch(query) via a React ref. If the ref is unset (e.g., DocumentGrid not yet mounted), the call is silently dropped.
GET /api/search?q={encodeURIComponent(query)} with Bearer token header from localStorage.
IndexManager.isIndexAvailable() always returns false; always delegates to FallbackSearchProvider.
SELECT * FROM documents_v2 WHERE name ILIKE $1 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC. Pattern is %{normalizedQuery}%.

entryPoint.notes: Separate from the SearchBar path. Bound to an <input> inside DocumentGrid's own header controls. Does NOT call the API.

calls.notes: Pure client-side filter: case-insensitive substring match on document.name and document.tags. No network call. Operates on already-loaded documents in local state.
